channel.title: Wisconsin Sports (Core Teams)
channel.description: Packers, Bucks, Brewers scores + UW Badgers scores & news.

item.title: UW News • Men's Basketball: Badgers suffer road setback at Oregon
item.description: The Wisconsin men's basketball team suffered a road setback to Oregon, 85-71, on Wednesday night at the Matthew Knight Arena in Eugene.

item.title: UW News • Men's Basketball: Five Things to Know: UW at Oregon
item.description: The Wisconsin men's basketball team looks to win back-to-back as they head out west for a road meeting at Oregon on Wednesday at Matthew Knight Arena.

item.title: UW News • Women's Basketball: Badgers fall to Bruins, 80-60
item.description: Dorja Zaja ties her career-high 16 points

item.title: UW News • Men's Basketball: Badgers surge past Iowa, 84-71
item.description: Led by a 27-point double-double from Nick Boyd, the Wisconsin men's basketball team surged past Iowa, 84-71, on Sunday at the Kohl Center.

UW News • Women's Basketball: Starting Five: Badgers face No. 2 Bruins on the road
item.description: Badgers set to play at Pauley Pavilion for the first time in program history

item.title: UW News • Women's Basketball: Badgers fall to USC, 66-59
item.description: Wisconsin breaks single season three point record

item.title: UW News • Men's Basketball: Five Things to Know: UW vs. Iowa
item.description: The Wisconsin men's basketball team looks to bounce back against rival Iowa on Sunday at the Kohl Center.

item.title: UW News • Men's Basketball: Badgers suffer setback at Ohio State
item.description: The No. 24 Wisconsin men's basketball fell to Ohio State on Tuesday night at the Schottenstein Center.

item.title: UW News • Women's Basketball: Starting Five: Wisconsin set for Thursday night thriller at USC
item.description: Badgers set to play at Galen Center for the first time in program history

item.title: UW News • Volleyball: Six Badgers Headed to WNTCT Training in Colorado
item.description: MADISON, Wis. – Six Badgers on the Wisconsin volleyball team are headed to Colorado Springs for the 2026 Women's National Team Collegiate Training at the U.S. Olympic & Paralympic Training Center from February 19-22.

item.title: UW News • Men's Basketball: Nick Boyd earns Big Ten Player of the Week
item.description: Wisconsin men's basketball grad student Nick Boyd has been named Big Ten Player of the Week, the conference announced Monday.

item.title: UW News • Women's Basketball: Wisconsin falls to Minnesota, 83-60
item.description: MADISON, Wis. — The Wisconsin women's basketball team (13-13, 5-10 B1G) fell, 83-60, to the Minnesota Golden Gophers (19-6, 10-4 B1G) Sunday evening at the Kohl Center.

item.title: UW News • Men's Basketball: Five Things to Know: Badgers at Ohio State
item.description: The Wisconsin men's basketball team hits the road for a rematch against Ohio State on Tuesday at the Value City Arena in Columbus, Ohio.

item.title: UW News • Men's Basketball: Badgers power past No. 10 Michigan State, 92-71
item.description: Behind prolific scoring performances from Nick Boyd and John Blackwell, the Wisconsin men's basketball team blew out No. 10 Michigan State, 92-71, on Friday night at the Kohl Center.

item.title: UW News • Football: Building the Badgers | Colton Joseph and Kenny Guiton
item.description: Hear from QBs coach Kenny Guiton and new Badger signal caller Colton Joseph

item.title: UW News • Women's Basketball: Starting Five: Wisconsin welcomes rival Minnesota
item.description: Badgers Look to defend home court against Golden Gophers

item.title: UW News • Men's Basketball: Five Things to Know: Wisconsin hosts No. 10 Michigan State
item.description: MADISON, Wis. — The Wisconsin men's basketball team looks to knock off their second top-10 team this week, taking on No. 10 Michigan State on Friday at the Kohl Center.

item.title: UW News • Volleyball: Volleyball Announces Summer Camps
item.description: MADISON, Wis. – The Wisconsin Volleyball program is thrilled to announce its 2026 summer volleyball camps!  This summer, Wisconsin Volleyball will be offering sessions for young kids, middle schoolers, and high school students. Wisconsin camps are geared to individuals of all levels including those just starting the sport to those that have been playing at the highest of levels. Join us this summer for instruction, drills, and an unforgettable experience.

item.title: UW News • Women's Basketball: Badgers fall to Illinois 92-60
item.description: Zaja collects career-high 16 points

item.title: Brewers News: NEW for 2026: Stream Crew games on Brewers.TV
UW News • Volleyball: Volleyball Announces Spring Schedule
item.description: MADISON, Wis. – The Wisconsin volleyball team announces it's four-match spring schedule, featuring one home match against Northern Illinois on April 24.

item.title: UW News • Women's Basketball: Wisconsin set to travel to Illinois
item.description: Badgers look to grab second-straight road win over illinois

item.title: UW News • Women's Basketball: Badgers fall to No. 24 Washington 91-86 in overtime
item.description: Uchenna and Howell end with over 20 points

item.title: UW News • Women's Basketball: Starting Five: Wisconsin welcomes No. 24 ranked Washington to Madison
item.description: The Badgers look to secure first win over Huskies since 2001

item.title: UW News • Volleyball: Tickets on Sale for AVCA First Serve
item.description: MADISON, Wis. – The Wisconsin volleyball team will kick-off the 2026 season in Milwaukee at the Fiserv Forum in the 2026 AVCA First Serve where eight elite teams, including the Badgers, will open the new season. Tickets are now on sale for the event on August 21-23.

item.title: UW News • Football: 2026 football schedule revealed
item.description: Big Ten matchups are set for 2026

item.title: UW News • Football: 2026 Season Tickets On Sale Now
UW News • Volleyball: Booth, Simon garner Volleyball awards
item.description: MADISON, Wis. - The 2025 Wisconsin volleyball team celebrated their annual program banquet at Union South on Saturday, presenting the winners of the Bring It! and Most Improved Awards.

item.title: UW News • Volleyball: Badgers to Play in 2026 AVCA First Serve
item.description: MADISON, Wis. – Mark the calendars as the Wisconsin volleyball team will compete at the 2026 American Volleyball Coaches Association (AVCA) First Serve, held at Milwaukee's Fiserv Forum from August 21-23, 2026.

item.title: UW News • Football: Posa earns Freshman All-America honors
item.description: Freshman LB led Wisconsin with 61 tackles

item.title: UW News • Football: Wisconsin adds Jayden Everett to coaching staff
item.description: Jayden Everett joins the UW staff as running backs coach

item.title: UW News • Volleyball: Colyer Named CWSA Honda Cup Finalist
item.description: MADISON, Wis. – After a prolific season with the Wisconsin volleyball team, outside hitter Mimi Colyer has been named a finalist in volleyball for the 2026 Honda Cup – the Collegiate Women Sports Award presented by Honda, announced by the CWSA Wednesday afternoon.

item.title: UW News • Football: Wisconsin Football: 2026 Transfer Additions
item.description: Follow along as the Badgers sign players during the 2026 transfer portal window

item.title: UW News • Volleyball: Booth signs with Italian Serie A1 League
item.description: MADISON, Wis. - After an illustrious collegiate career, middle blocker Carter Booth has signed with the Unione Yamamay Busto Arisizio of the Italian Serie A1 League to begin her professional tenure.

item.title: UW News • Football: Wisconsin adds Robert Steeples to staff
item.description: Steeples named cornerbacks coach, Haynes to oversee secondary

item.title: UW News • Volleyball: Wisconsin lands at No. 8 in Fall Learfield Directors' Cup
item.description: The National Association of Collegiate Directors of Athletics and LEARFIELD released its Fall Division I Learfield Directors' Cup standings this Tuesday, with Wisconsin placing eighth after a another successful fall season.

item.title: UW News • Volleyball: Volleyball adds Travis and Hoppe
item.description: MADISON, Wis. - Head coach Kelly Sheffield of the Wisconsin volleyball program has announced the signing of outside hitter Eva Travis from UC Santa Barbara and setter Isabelle Hoppe from Pine-Richland High School in Gibsonia, Pa. Both Travis and Hoppe will arrive for spring semester of 2026.

item.title: UW News • Football: Wisconsin adds Eric Mateos as offensive line coach
item.description: 15-year coaching veteran joins Badgers after stints at Arkansas, Baylor, BYU, LSU

item.title: UW News • Football: Wisconsin Football - National Signing Day
item.description: Follow along as the Badgers add a new crop of talent on National Signing Day

item.title: Brewers News: Solve today's Brewers trivia puzzle
Brewers News: Brewers' Top 30 Prospects list
item.description: Who do the Brewers have in the pipeline? Get scouting reports, video, stats, projected ETAs and more for Milwaukee's Top 30 Prospects.
